*�����������������ppar = parent().par

def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	
	parentw = max(1, parent().width)
	parenth = max(1, parent().height)
	la = ppar.Labelalign	
	
	scop.clear()

	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	# scop.appendRow( ['..', 'buttontype', 'momentary', '1'] ) 

	if (ppar.Horizvert == 'horizontal') or ((ppar.Horizvert == 'auto') and (parentw >= parenth)) :
		bw = parentw
		bh = parenth				
	else :
		bw = parenth
		bh = parentw	
		
	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :
		aspectxy = op('topon').width / op('topon').height	
		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth))
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la=='left' or la=='right') else bw )
				
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'resolutionw', lw*osize, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'resolutionh', bh*osize, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	#oltx = iw/bw/2 if ppar.Labellocate=='right' else -iw/bw/2
	#scop.appendRow( ['underlabel', 'tx', oltx, '1'] )
	#oitx = 0
	#if ppar.Labellocate=='left' :
	#	oitx = .5-iw/bw/2
	#elif ppar.Labellocate=='right' :
	#	oitx = -.5+iw/bw/2
	#scop.appendRow( ['undericon', 'tx', oitx, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['overtext', 'tx', oitx, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	return

*�����������������Mppar = parent().par

def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	
	parentw = max(1, parent().width)
	parenth = max(1, parent().height)
	iconop = op('indicator')
	iconopwidth = iconop.width
	iconopheight = iconop.height

	aspectxy = iconopwidth / parenth
	la = ppar.Labelalign	
	
	scop.clear()

	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	# scop.appendRow( ['..', 'buttontype', 'momentary', '1'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Binary.Flip :
		bw = parentw
		bh = parenth				
	else :
		bw = parenth
		bh = parentw	
		
	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :
		aspectxy = iconopwidth / iconopheight	
		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth)+1)
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la in ['left', 'right', 'center']) else bw )
				
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'w', lw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'h', bh, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	oltx = iw/bw if ppar.Labellocate=='right' else 0
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'x', oltx * bw, '1'] )

	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'w', iw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'h', ih, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )

	oitx = 0
	if ppar.Labellocate=='left' :
		oitx = 1-iw/bw
	elif ppar.Labellocate=='right' :
		oitx = 0
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['indicator', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	return



2
*�����������������x# panelValue is the PanelValue object that changed.

def offToOn(panelValue):
	ppar = parent().par
	ppan = parent().panel
	winp = op('window').par
	strip = op('strip')
	
	parentw = max(1, parent().width)
	parenth = max(1, parent().height)

	locate = ppar.Menulocate
	if locate=='dropdown' or locate=='dropadapt' :
		winp.winoffsetx = strip.width/2 - ppan.insideu * parentw + (0 if ppar.Sellabwidth>=parentw else ppar.Sellabwidth)
		winp.winoffsety = -strip.height/2 - ppan.insidev * parenth
		
	elif locate=='dropup' :
		winp.winoffsetx = strip.width/2 - ppan.insideu * parentw + (0 if ppar.Sellabwidth>=parentw else ppar.Sellabwidth)
		winp.winoffsety = strip.height/2 + (1-ppan.insidev) * parenth

	elif locate=='mouseright' or locate=='mouseadapt' :
		winp.winoffsetx = strip.width/2 + 10
		winp.winoffsety = 0

	else :
		winp.winoffsetx = - strip.width/2 - 10
		winp.winoffsety = 0
	
	if ppar.Preselect==False :
		strip.par.Value1 = -1
	
	op('window').par.winopen.pulse()
	strip.setFocus()
	return

def whileOn(panelValue):
	return

def onToOff(panelValue):
	return

def whileOff(panelValue):
	return

def valueChange(panelValue):
	return

*�����������������Mppar = parent().par

def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	
	parentw = max(1, parent().width)
	parenth = max(1, parent().height)
	iconop = op('indicator')
	iconopwidth = iconop.width
	iconopheight = iconop.height

	aspectxy = iconopwidth / parenth
	la = ppar.Labelalign	
	
	scop.clear()

	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	# scop.appendRow( ['..', 'buttontype', 'momentary', '1'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Binary.Flip :
		bw = parentw
		bh = parenth				
	else :
		bw = parenth
		bh = parentw	
		
	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :
		aspectxy = iconopwidth / iconopheight	
		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth)+1)
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la in ['left', 'right', 'center']) else bw )
				
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'w', lw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'h', bh, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	oltx = iw/bw if ppar.Labellocate=='right' else 0
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'x', oltx * bw, '1'] )

	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'w', iw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'h', ih, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )

	oitx = 0
	if ppar.Labellocate=='left' :
		oitx = 1-iw/bw
	elif ppar.Labellocate=='right' :
		oitx = 0
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['indicator', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	return

*�����������������9def setupParameters(scrop):
	return

def cook(scrop):
	ppar = parent().par	
	bgrey = .17	 # background grey
	
	parentw = parent().width
	parenth = parent().height
	
	if (ppar.Horizvert == 'horizontal') or ((ppar.Horizvert == 'auto') and (parentw >= parenth)) :
		w = parentw
	else:
		w = parenth
		
	sl = ppar.Borderlow/w
	if ppar.Numfield =='edit' and op('flip').par.npasses==0 :
		sl = sl + (60+ppar.Borderhigh)/w
	sh = 1-ppar.Borderhigh/w
	
	scrop.clear()

	scrop.appendRow( [0, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] ) 

	scrop.appendRow( [sl, 0, 0, 0, 0] )

	try:
		notchlist = eval(ppar.Notches.val)

		for notch in notchlist :
			nu = sl + notch*(sh-sl)
			scrop.appendRow( [ nu-.01, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )
			scrop.appendRow( [ nu+.01, 0, 0, 0, 0] )
	
	except:
		pass
	scrop.appendRow( [ sh, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )
		
	return

*�����������������Mppar = parent().par

def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	
	parentw = max(1, parent().width)
	parenth = max(1, parent().height)
	iconop = op('indicator')
	iconopwidth = iconop.width
	iconopheight = iconop.height

	aspectxy = iconopwidth / parenth
	la = ppar.Labelalign	
	
	scop.clear()

	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	# scop.appendRow( ['..', 'buttontype', 'momentary', '1'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Binary.Flip :
		bw = parentw
		bh = parenth				
	else :
		bw = parenth
		bh = parentw	
		
	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :
		aspectxy = iconopwidth / iconopheight	
		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth)+1)
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la in ['left', 'right', 'center']) else bw )
				
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'w', lw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'h', bh, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	oltx = iw/bw if ppar.Labellocate=='right' else 0
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'x', oltx * bw, '1'] )

	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'w', iw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'h', ih, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )

	oitx = 0
	if ppar.Labellocate=='left' :
		oitx = 1-iw/bw
	elif ppar.Labellocate=='right' :
		oitx = 0
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['indicator', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	return

*�����������������Put this component outside or inside a slider. If it is inside a slider, make the Panel COMP parameter be parent().

It works with a horizontal, vertical or uv horizontal-vertical slider.

Shift-click-and-drag to teach it the gesture. It will repeat when you release the mouse. Optionally you can double-click and drag. Just click the slider to disable the gesture.

Note that the Filter CHOP affects the recording, CHanging the Filter Time in the parent does not change the filtering during playback.

THis component can safely be put in clones.

TUIK2 vertical sliders (slidervert) needs its SLider Type to be set to UV for this to work.

*�����������������~# me - this DAT
# scriptOp - the OP which is cooking
#
# press 'Setup Parameters' in the OP to call this function to re-create the parameters.
def setupParameters(scriptOp):
	return

# called whenever custom pulse parameter is pushed
def onPulse(par):
	return

def cook(scriptOp):
	scriptOp.clear()

	scriptOp.appendRow(['totarget', 'topath', 'topar', 'fromtarget', 'frompath', 'fromchan', 'low', 'high', 'cmd']) 
	
	inop = scriptOp.inputs[0]
	for i in range(1,inop.numRows) :
		topath = inop[i,'topath']
		toop = op(topath)
		topar = inop[i,'topar']

		frompath = inop[i,'frompath']
		fromchan = inop[i,'fromchan']
		
		if topar == 'Value1' :
			try:
				low = toop.par.Rangelow1
				high = toop.par.Rangehigh1
			except:
				low = 0.
				high = 1.
			
		elif topar == 'Value2' :
			try:
				low = toop.par.Rangelow2
				high = toop.par.Rangehigh2
			except:
				low = 0.
				high = 1.
			
		else:	
				low = 0.
				high = 1.

		cmd = "op('" + topath + "').par." + topar + " = " + str(low) + " + " + str(high-low) + " * "
		
		scriptOp.appendRow([topath+':'+topar, topath, topar, frompath+':'+fromchan, frompath, fromchan, low, high, cmd])

	return

	return

*�����������������ppar = parent().par

def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	
	parentw = max(1, parent().width)
	parenth = max(1, parent().height)
	la = ppar.Labelalign	
	
	scop.clear()

	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	# scop.appendRow( ['..', 'buttontype', 'momentary', '1'] ) 

	if (ppar.Horizvert == 'horizontal') or ((ppar.Horizvert == 'auto') and (parentw >= parenth)) :
		bw = parentw
		bh = parenth				
	else :
		bw = parenth
		bh = parentw	
		
	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :
		aspectxy = op('topon').width / op('topon').height	
		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth))
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la=='left' or la=='right') else bw )
				
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'resolutionw', lw*osize, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'resolutionh', bh*osize, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	#oltx = iw/bw/2 if ppar.Labellocate=='right' else -iw/bw/2
	#scop.appendRow( ['underlabel', 'tx', oltx, '1'] )
	#oitx = 0
	#if ppar.Labellocate=='left' :
	#	oitx = .5-iw/bw/2
	#elif ppar.Labellocate=='right' :
	#	oitx = -.5+iw/bw/2
	#scop.appendRow( ['undericon', 'tx', oitx, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['overtext', 'tx', oitx, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	return

*�����������������ppar = parent().par

def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	
	parentw = max(1, parent().width)
	parenth = max(1, parent().height)
	la = ppar.Labelalign	
	
	scop.clear()

	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	# scop.appendRow( ['..', 'buttontype', 'momentary', '1'] ) 

	if (ppar.Horizvert == 'horizontal') or ((ppar.Horizvert == 'auto') and (parentw >= parenth)) :
		bw = parentw
		bh = parenth				
	else :
		bw = parenth
		bh = parentw	
		
	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :
		aspectxy = op('topon').width / op('topon').height	
		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth))
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la=='left' or la=='right') else bw )
				
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'resolutionw', lw*osize, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'resolutionh', bh*osize, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	#oltx = iw/bw/2 if ppar.Labellocate=='right' else -iw/bw/2
	#scop.appendRow( ['underlabel', 'tx', oltx, '1'] )
	#oitx = 0
	#if ppar.Labellocate=='left' :
	#	oitx = .5-iw/bw/2
	#elif ppar.Labellocate=='right' :
	#	oitx = -.5+iw/bw/2
	#scop.appendRow( ['undericon', 'tx', oitx, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['overtext', 'tx', oitx, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	return

*�����������������9def setupParameters(scrop):
	return

def cook(scrop):
	ppar = parent().par	
	bgrey = .17	 # background grey
	
	parentw = parent().width
	parenth = parent().height
	
	if (ppar.Horizvert == 'horizontal') or ((ppar.Horizvert == 'auto') and (parentw >= parenth)) :
		w = parentw
	else:
		w = parenth
		
	sl = ppar.Borderlow/w
	if ppar.Numfield =='edit' and op('flip').par.npasses==0 :
		sl = sl + (60+ppar.Borderhigh)/w
	sh = 1-ppar.Borderhigh/w
	
	scrop.clear()

	scrop.appendRow( [0, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] ) 

	scrop.appendRow( [sl, 0, 0, 0, 0] )

	try:
		notchlist = eval(ppar.Notches.val)

		for notch in notchlist :
			nu = sl + notch*(sh-sl)
			scrop.appendRow( [ nu-.01, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )
			scrop.appendRow( [ nu+.01, 0, 0, 0, 0] )
	
	except:
		pass
	scrop.appendRow( [ sh, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )
		
	return

*����������������� (# Text Component callbacks

def onValueChange(comp, value, prevValue):
	"""
	Called whenever the text component's value parameter changes for any reason including typing
	in the text window or changing the parameter directly. The callback is equivalent to the
	onValueChange in the parameter exectute DAT.
	
	Args:
		comp: the text component
		value: the new value
		prevValue: the previous value
	"""
	#debug('\nonValueChange comp:', comp.path, '- new value: ', value, ', prev value: ', prevValue )
	
	try:
		parent().par.Celldat.eval()[parent().par.Cellrow,parent().par.Cellcol] = value
	except:
		pass
	return
	
def onFocus(comp):
	"""
	Called when one of the text components viewers gets keyboard focus. 
	
	Args:
		comp: the text component
	"""
	#debug('\nonFocus comp:', comp.path)
	return

def onFocusEnd(comp, info):
	"""
	Called when one of the text component's viewers loses keyboard focus. In regular editing mode
	this is right after the contents are saved back to the value parameter. This function is called
	everytime the viewer loses focus, even if the text does not change.
	
	Args:
		comp: the text component
		info: a dictionary containing information about the event including:
			reason: a string indicating what caused the viewer to lose focus e.g. 'enter', 'escape', 'tab', 'unknown'
	
	"""
	#debug('\nonFocusEnd comp:', comp.path, '- info:\n', info)
	return
	
def onTextEdit(comp):
	"""
	Called each time the contents of the text component viewer change i.e. when typing a character,
	deleting text, cutting or pasting. 
	
	Args:
		comp: the text component
	"""
	#debug('\nonTextEdit comp:', comp.path, '- text: ', comp.editText)
	return
	
def onTextEditEnd(comp, value, prevValue):
	"""
	Called when the user finishes editing and the value has been changed. Not called in 'Continuous Edit' mode. Use
	onTextEdit and onFocusEnd when using continuous editing.
	
	Args:
		comp: the text component
		value: the new value
		prevValue: the previous value
	"""
	#debug('\nonTextEditEnd comp:', comp.path, '- new value: ', value, ', prev value: ', prevValue )
	return

def cook(scop):
	ppar = parent().par
	
	#osize = ppar.Oversize  # TOP 
			
	w = max(1, parent().width)
	h = max(1, parent().height)
	sl = ppar.Borderlow/w
	sh = 1-ppar.Borderhigh/w
		
	scop.clear()
	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 

	#scop.appendRow( ['interior', 'sx', sh-sl, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['interior', 'tx', sl, '1'] )
	
	#scop.appendRow( ['flip', 'npasses', '0', '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'w', w, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'h', h, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
		
	scop.appendRow( ['..', 'bgcolorr', ppar.Bgcolorr, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['..', 'bgcolorg', ppar.Bgcolorg, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['..', 'bgcolorb', ppar.Bgcolorb, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['..', 'bgalpha', ppar.Bgcolora, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	#scop.appendRow( ['text', 'dispmethod', ['texture','bitmap'][osize==1.0], '1'] )	
	#scop.appendRow( ['field/text', 'dispmethod', ['texture','bitmap'][osize==1.0], '1'] )	
	
	if ppar.Labelalign!='right' :
		pos = 0 if ppar.Labellocate=='left' else (sl+.01)
	else :
		pos = (sl-1-.02) if ppar.Labellocate=='left' else (sh-1-.01)
	
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'textoffsetx', pos, '1'] )
		
	return

*�����������������Mppar = parent().par

def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	
	parentw = max(1, parent().width)
	parenth = max(1, parent().height)
	iconop = op('indicator')
	iconopwidth = iconop.width
	iconopheight = iconop.height

	aspectxy = iconopwidth / parenth
	la = ppar.Labelalign	
	
	scop.clear()

	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	# scop.appendRow( ['..', 'buttontype', 'momentary', '1'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Binary.Flip :
		bw = parentw
		bh = parenth				
	else :
		bw = parenth
		bh = parentw	
		
	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :
		aspectxy = iconopwidth / iconopheight	
		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth)+1)
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la in ['left', 'right', 'center']) else bw )
				
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'w', lw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'h', bh, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	oltx = iw/bw if ppar.Labellocate=='right' else 0
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'x', oltx * bw, '1'] )

	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'w', iw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'h', ih, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )

	oitx = 0
	if ppar.Labellocate=='left' :
		oitx = 1-iw/bw
	elif ppar.Labellocate=='right' :
		oitx = 0
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['indicator', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	return

*�����������������Ippar = parent().par

def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	
	parentw = max(1, parent().width)
	parenth = max(1, parent().height)
	iconop = op('indicator')
	iconopwidth = iconop.width
	iconopheight = iconop.height
	
	aspectxy = iconopwidth / parenth
	la = ppar.Labelalign	
	
	scop.clear()

	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	# scop.appendRow( ['..', 'buttontype', 'momentary', '1'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Binary.Flip :
		bw = parentw
		bh = parenth				
	else :
		bw = parenth
		bh = parentw	

	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :
		aspectxy = iconopwidth / iconopheight	
		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth))
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la=='left' or la=='right') else bw )
				
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'w', lw, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'h', bh, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	#oltx = iw/bw if ppar.Labellocate=='right' else 0
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'x', oltx * bw, '1'] )

	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'w', iw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'h', ih, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )

	oitx = 0
	if ppar.Labellocate=='left' :
		oitx = 1-iw/bw
	elif ppar.Labellocate=='right' :
		oitx = 0
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['indicator', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	
	return

*�����������������# Text Component callbacks

def onValueChange(comp, value, prevValue):
	"""
	Called whenever the text component's value parameter changes for any reason including typing
	in the text window or changing the parameter directly. The callback is equivalent to the
	onValueChange in the parameter exectute DAT.
	
	Args:
		comp: the text component
		value: the new value
		prevValue: the previous value
	"""
	#debug('\nonValueChange comp:', comp.path, '- new value: ', value, ', prev value: ', prevValue )
	return
	
def onFocus(comp):
	"""
	Called when one of the text components viewers gets keyboard focus. 
	
	Args:
		comp: the text component
	"""
	#debug('\nonFocus comp:', comp.path)
	return

def onFocusEnd(comp, info):
	"""
	Called when one of the text component's viewers loses keyboard focus. In regular editing mode
	this is right after the contents are saved back to the value parameter. This function is called
	everytime the viewer loses focus, even if the text does not change.
	
	Args:
		comp: the text component
		info: a dictionary containing information about the event including:
			reason: a string indicating what caused the viewer to lose focus e.g. 'enter', 'escape', 'tab', 'unknown'
	
	"""
	#debug('\nonFocusEnd comp:', comp.path, '- info:\n', info)
	return
	
def onTextEdit(comp):
	"""
	Called each time the contents of the text component viewer change i.e. when typing a character,
	deleting text, cutting or pasting. 
	
	Args:
		comp: the text component
	"""
	#debug('\nonTextEdit comp:', comp.path, '- text: ', comp.editText)
	return

2
*�����������������*def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	ppar = parent().par
	
	parentw = max(1, parent().width)
	parenth = max(1, parent().height)
	
	scop.clear()
	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Slider.Flip :
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'slidertype', 'slideru', '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'clampul', ppar.Clamplow1, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'clampuh', ppar.Clamphigh1, '1'] )
		
		w = parentw
		h = parenth

		sl = labr = ppar.Borderlow/w
		if ppar.Numfield =='edit' :
			sl = sl + (60+ppar.Borderhigh)/w
		sh = 1-ppar.Borderhigh/w
	
		halfhandle = .5*ppar.Handlesize/parentw
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zonel', sl + halfhandle, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zoner', sh - halfhandle, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zoneb', 0, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zonet', 1, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['math', 'fromrange1', ppar.Rangelow1, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['math', 'fromrange2', ppar.Rangehigh1, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['math', 'torange1', (sl + halfhandle) * w, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['math', 'torange2', (sh - halfhandle) * w, '1'] )
		
		#scop.appendRow( ['iovert', 'sy', 1-(4/parenth), '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['interior', 'sx', sh-sl, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['interior', 'tx', sl, '1'] )

		scop.appendRow( ['panelexec', 'panelvalue', "'u click key'", '1'] )
		#scop.appendRow( ['flip', 'npasses', '0', '1'] )
		#scop.appendRow( ['text', 'resolutionw', parentw*osize, '1'] )
		#scop.appendRow( ['text', 'resolutionh', parenth*osize, '1'] )
		
		fieldw = parentw-ppar.Borderlow-ppar.Borderhigh
		if ppar.Numfield =='edit' :
			fieldw = min(60, fieldw)
		scop.appendRow( ['field', 'w', fieldw, '1'] )

	else :
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'slidertype', 'sliderv', '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'clampvl', ppar.Clamplow1, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'clampvh', ppar.Clamphigh1, '1'] )
		
		w = parenth
		h = parentw
		sl = labr = ppar.Borderlow/w
		sh = 1-ppar.Borderhigh/w
	
		halfhandle = .5*ppar.Handlesize/parenth
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zonel', 0, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zoner', 1, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zoneb', sl + halfhandle, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zonet', sh - halfhandle, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['math', 'fromrange1', ppar.Rangelow1, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['math', 'fromrange2', ppar.Rangehigh1, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['math', 'torange1', (sl + halfhandle) * w, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['math', 'torange2', (sh - halfhandle) * w, '1'] )

		#scop.appendRow( ['iovert', 'sy', 1-(4/parentw), '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['interior', 'sy', sh-sl, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['interior', 'ty', sl, '1'] )

		scop.appendRow( ['panelexec', 'panelvalue', "'v click key'", '1'] )
		#scop.appendRow( ['flip', 'npasses', '1', '1'] )
		#scop.appendRow( ['text', 'resolutionw', parenth*osize, '1'] )
		#scop.appendRow( ['text', 'resolutionh', parentw*osize, '1'] )

		scop.appendRow( ['field', 'w', 40, '1'] )
		
	#scop.appendRow( ['..', 'bgcolorr', ppar.Bgcolorr, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['..', 'bgcolorg', ppar.Bgcolorg, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['..', 'bgcolorb', ppar.Bgcolorb, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['..', 'bgalpha', ppar.Bgcolora, '1'] )

	parent().par.bgcolorr = ppar.Bgcolorr.eval()
	parent().par.bgcolorg = ppar.Bgcolorg.eval()
	parent().par.bgcolorb = ppar.Bgcolorb.eval()
	parent().par.bgalpha = ppar.Bgcolora.eval()
	
	fontsize = 12 if ppar.Fontauto==True else ppar.Fontsize
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	#scop.appendRow( ['text', 'dispmethod', ['automatic','bitmap'][osize==1.0], '1'] )	
	#scop.appendRow( ['field/text', 'dispmethod', ['texture','bitmap'][osize==1.0], '1'] )	
	
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )

	if ppar.Labelalign == 'left' :
		pos = 0 if ppar.Labellocate=='left' else (sl-.01)
	elif ppar.Labelalign == 'center' :
		pos = (labr-1-.02)/2 if ppar.Labellocate=='left' else (sl+sh-1)/2
	else :
		pos = (labr-1-.02) if ppar.Labellocate=='left' else (sh-1-.01)
	
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'textoffsetx', pos, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['underoff', 'npasses', int(ppar.Showoffset), '1'] )
	
	scop.appendRow( ['underoff', 'sy', 4/h, '1'] )
		
	return

2
*�����������������9def setupParameters(scrop):
	return

def cook(scrop):
	ppar = parent().par	
	bgrey = .17	 # background grey
	
	parentw = parent().width
	parenth = parent().height
	
	if (ppar.Horizvert == 'horizontal') or ((ppar.Horizvert == 'auto') and (parentw >= parenth)) :
		w = parentw
	else:
		w = parenth
		
	sl = ppar.Borderlow/w
	if ppar.Numfield =='edit' and op('flip').par.npasses==0 :
		sl = sl + (60+ppar.Borderhigh)/w
	sh = 1-ppar.Borderhigh/w
	
	scrop.clear()

	scrop.appendRow( [0, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] ) 

	scrop.appendRow( [sl, 0, 0, 0, 0] )

	try:
		notchlist = eval(ppar.Notches.val)

		for notch in notchlist :
			nu = sl + notch*(sh-sl)
			scrop.appendRow( [ nu-.01, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )
			scrop.appendRow( [ nu+.01, 0, 0, 0, 0] )
	
	except:
		pass
	scrop.appendRow( [ sh, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )
		
	return

*�����������������Mppar = parent().par

def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	
	parentw = max(1, parent().width)
	parenth = max(1, parent().height)
	iconop = op('indicator')
	iconopwidth = iconop.width
	iconopheight = iconop.height

	aspectxy = iconopwidth / parenth
	la = ppar.Labelalign	
	
	scop.clear()

	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	# scop.appendRow( ['..', 'buttontype', 'momentary', '1'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Binary.Flip :
		bw = parentw
		bh = parenth				
	else :
		bw = parenth
		bh = parentw	
		
	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :
		aspectxy = iconopwidth / iconopheight	
		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth)+1)
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la in ['left', 'right', 'center']) else bw )
				
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'w', lw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'h', bh, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	oltx = iw/bw if ppar.Labellocate=='right' else 0
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'x', oltx * bw, '1'] )

	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'w', iw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'h', ih, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )

	oitx = 0
	if ppar.Labellocate=='left' :
		oitx = 1-iw/bw
	elif ppar.Labellocate=='right' :
		oitx = 0
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['indicator', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	return

			scrop.appendRow( [ nu+.01, 0, 0, 0, 0] )
	
	except:
		pass
	scrop.appendRow( [ sh, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )

*�����������������# Text Component callbacks

def onValueChange(comp, value, prevValue):
	"""
	Called whenever the text component's value parameter changes for any reason including typing
	in the text window or changing the parameter directly. The callback is equivalent to the
	onValueChange in the parameter exectute DAT.
	
	Args:
		comp: the text component
		value: the new value
		prevValue: the previous value
	"""
	#debug('\nonValueChange comp:', comp.path, '- new value: ', value, ', prev value: ', prevValue )
	return
	
def onFocus(comp):
	"""
	Called when one of the text components viewers gets keyboard focus. 
	
	Args:
		comp: the text component
	"""
	#debug('\nonFocus comp:', comp.path)
	return

def onFocusEnd(comp, info):
	"""
	Called when one of the text component's viewers loses keyboard focus. In regular editing mode
	this is right after the contents are saved back to the value parameter. This function is called
	everytime the viewer loses focus, even if the text does not change.
	
	Args:
		comp: the text component
		info: a dictionary containing information about the event including:
			reason: a string indicating what caused the viewer to lose focus e.g. 'enter', 'escape', 'tab', 'unknown'
	
	"""
	#debug('\nonFocusEnd comp:', comp.path, '- info:\n', info)
	return
	
def onTextEdit(comp):
	"""
	Called each time the contents of the text component viewer change i.e. when typing a character,
	deleting text, cutting or pasting. 
	
	Args:
		comp: the text component
	"""
	#debug('\nonTextEdit comp:', comp.path, '- text: ', comp.editText)
	return

*�����������������*def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	ppar = parent().par
	
	parentw = max(1, parent().width)
	parenth = max(1, parent().height)
	
	scop.clear()
	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Slider.Flip :
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'slidertype', 'slideru', '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'clampul', ppar.Clamplow1, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'clampuh', ppar.Clamphigh1, '1'] )
		
		w = parentw
		h = parenth

		sl = labr = ppar.Borderlow/w
		if ppar.Numfield =='edit' :
			sl = sl + (60+ppar.Borderhigh)/w
		sh = 1-ppar.Borderhigh/w
	
		halfhandle = .5*ppar.Handlesize/parentw
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zonel', sl + halfhandle, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zoner', sh - halfhandle, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zoneb', 0, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zonet', 1, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['math', 'fromrange1', ppar.Rangelow1, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['math', 'fromrange2', ppar.Rangehigh1, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['math', 'torange1', (sl + halfhandle) * w, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['math', 'torange2', (sh - halfhandle) * w, '1'] )
		
		#scop.appendRow( ['iovert', 'sy', 1-(4/parenth), '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['interior', 'sx', sh-sl, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['interior', 'tx', sl, '1'] )

		scop.appendRow( ['panelexec', 'panelvalue', "'u click key'", '1'] )
		#scop.appendRow( ['flip', 'npasses', '0', '1'] )
		#scop.appendRow( ['text', 'resolutionw', parentw*osize, '1'] )
		#scop.appendRow( ['text', 'resolutionh', parenth*osize, '1'] )
		
		fieldw = parentw-ppar.Borderlow-ppar.Borderhigh
		if ppar.Numfield =='edit' :
			fieldw = min(60, fieldw)
		scop.appendRow( ['field', 'w', fieldw, '1'] )

	else :
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'slidertype', 'sliderv', '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'clampvl', ppar.Clamplow1, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'clampvh', ppar.Clamphigh1, '1'] )
		
		w = parenth
		h = parentw
		sl = labr = ppar.Borderlow/w
		sh = 1-ppar.Borderhigh/w
	
		halfhandle = .5*ppar.Handlesize/parenth
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zonel', 0, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zoner', 1, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zoneb', sl + halfhandle, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zonet', sh - halfhandle, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['math', 'fromrange1', ppar.Rangelow1, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['math', 'fromrange2', ppar.Rangehigh1, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['math', 'torange1', (sl + halfhandle) * w, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['math', 'torange2', (sh - halfhandle) * w, '1'] )

		#scop.appendRow( ['iovert', 'sy', 1-(4/parentw), '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['interior', 'sy', sh-sl, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['interior', 'ty', sl, '1'] )

		scop.appendRow( ['panelexec', 'panelvalue', "'v click key'", '1'] )
		#scop.appendRow( ['flip', 'npasses', '1', '1'] )
		#scop.appendRow( ['text', 'resolutionw', parenth*osize, '1'] )
		#scop.appendRow( ['text', 'resolutionh', parentw*osize, '1'] )

		scop.appendRow( ['field', 'w', 40, '1'] )
		
	#scop.appendRow( ['..', 'bgcolorr', ppar.Bgcolorr, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['..', 'bgcolorg', ppar.Bgcolorg, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['..', 'bgcolorb', ppar.Bgcolorb, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['..', 'bgalpha', ppar.Bgcolora, '1'] )

	parent().par.bgcolorr = ppar.Bgcolorr.eval()
	parent().par.bgcolorg = ppar.Bgcolorg.eval()
	parent().par.bgcolorb = ppar.Bgcolorb.eval()
	parent().par.bgalpha = ppar.Bgcolora.eval()
	
	fontsize = 12 if ppar.Fontauto==True else ppar.Fontsize
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	#scop.appendRow( ['text', 'dispmethod', ['automatic','bitmap'][osize==1.0], '1'] )	
	#scop.appendRow( ['field/text', 'dispmethod', ['texture','bitmap'][osize==1.0], '1'] )	
	
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )

	if ppar.Labelalign == 'left' :
		pos = 0 if ppar.Labellocate=='left' else (sl-.01)
	elif ppar.Labelalign == 'center' :
		pos = (labr-1-.02)/2 if ppar.Labellocate=='left' else (sl+sh-1)/2
	else :
		pos = (labr-1-.02) if ppar.Labellocate=='left' else (sh-1-.01)
	
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'textoffsetx', pos, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['underoff', 'npasses', int(ppar.Showoffset), '1'] )
	
	scop.appendRow( ['underoff', 'sy', 4/h, '1'] )
		
	return

*�����������������9def setupParameters(scrop):
	return

def cook(scrop):
	ppar = parent().par	
	bgrey = .17	 # background grey
	
	parentw = parent().width
	parenth = parent().height
	
	if (ppar.Horizvert == 'horizontal') or ((ppar.Horizvert == 'auto') and (parentw >= parenth)) :
		w = parentw
	else:
		w = parenth
		
	sl = ppar.Borderlow/w
	if ppar.Numfield =='edit' and op('flip').par.npasses==0 :
		sl = sl + (60+ppar.Borderhigh)/w
	sh = 1-ppar.Borderhigh/w
	
	scrop.clear()

	scrop.appendRow( [0, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] ) 

	scrop.appendRow( [sl, 0, 0, 0, 0] )

	try:
		notchlist = eval(ppar.Notches.val)

		for notch in notchlist :
			nu = sl + notch*(sh-sl)
			scrop.appendRow( [ nu-.01, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )
			scrop.appendRow( [ nu+.01, 0, 0, 0, 0] )
	
	except:
		pass
	scrop.appendRow( [ sh, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )
		
	return

*�����������������Mppar = parent().par

def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	
	parentw = max(1, parent().width)
	parenth = max(1, parent().height)
	iconop = op('indicator')
	iconopwidth = iconop.width
	iconopheight = iconop.height

	aspectxy = iconopwidth / parenth
	la = ppar.Labelalign	
	
	scop.clear()

	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	# scop.appendRow( ['..', 'buttontype', 'momentary', '1'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Binary.Flip :
		bw = parentw
		bh = parenth				
	else :
		bw = parenth
		bh = parentw	
		
	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :
		aspectxy = iconopwidth / iconopheight	
		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth)+1)
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la in ['left', 'right', 'center']) else bw )
				
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'w', lw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'h', bh, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	oltx = iw/bw if ppar.Labellocate=='right' else 0
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'x', oltx * bw, '1'] )

	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'w', iw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'h', ih, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )

	oitx = 0
	if ppar.Labellocate=='left' :
		oitx = 1-iw/bw
	elif ppar.Labellocate=='right' :
		oitx = 0
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['indicator', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	return

*�����������������# Text Component callbacks

def onValueChange(comp, value, prevValue):
	"""
	Called whenever the text component's value parameter changes for any reason including typing
	in the text window or changing the parameter directly. The callback is equivalent to the
	onValueChange in the parameter exectute DAT.
	
	Args:
		comp: the text component
		value: the new value
		prevValue: the previous value
	"""
	#debug('\nonValueChange comp:', comp.path, '- new value: ', value, ', prev value: ', prevValue )
	return
	
def onFocus(comp):
	"""
	Called when one of the text components viewers gets keyboard focus. 
	
	Args:
		comp: the text component
	"""
	#debug('\nonFocus comp:', comp.path)
	return

def onFocusEnd(comp, info):
	"""
	Called when one of the text component's viewers loses keyboard focus. In regular editing mode
	this is right after the contents are saved back to the value parameter. This function is called
	everytime the viewer loses focus, even if the text does not change.
	
	Args:
		comp: the text component
		info: a dictionary containing information about the event including:
			reason: a string indicating what caused the viewer to lose focus e.g. 'enter', 'escape', 'tab', 'unknown'
	
	"""
	#debug('\nonFocusEnd comp:', comp.path, '- info:\n', info)
	return
	
def onTextEdit(comp):
	"""
	Called each time the contents of the text component viewer change i.e. when typing a character,
	deleting text, cutting or pasting. 
	
	Args:
		comp: the text component
	"""
	#debug('\nonTextEdit comp:', comp.path, '- text: ', comp.editText)
	return

def cook(scop):

	parentw = max(1, parent().width)
	parenth = max(1, parent().height)
	
	scop.clear()
	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Slider.Flip :
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'slidertype', 'slideru', '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'clampul', ppar.Clamplow1, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'clampuh', ppar.Clamphigh1, '1'] )

	bgrey = .17	 # background grey

	sl = ppar.Borderlow/w
	if ppar.Numfield =='edit' and op('flip').par.npasses==0 :

	scrop.clear()

	scrop.appendRow( [0, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] ) 

	scrop.appendRow( [sl, 0, 0, 0, 0] )

	try:
		notchlist = eval(ppar.Notches.val)

		for notch in notchlist :
			nu = sl + notch*(sh-sl)
			scrop.appendRow( [ nu-.01, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )
			scrop.appendRow( [ nu+.01, 0, 0, 0, 0] )
	
	except:
		pass
	scrop.appendRow( [ sh, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )
		
	return

*�����������������# Text Component callbacks

def onValueChange(comp, value, prevValue):
	"""
	Called whenever the text component's value parameter changes for any reason including typing
	in the text window or changing the parameter directly. The callback is equivalent to the
	onValueChange in the parameter exectute DAT.
	
	Args:
		comp: the text component
		value: the new value
		prevValue: the previous value
	"""
	#debug('\nonValueChange comp:', comp.path, '- new value: ', value, ', prev value: ', prevValue )
	return
	
def onFocus(comp):
	"""
	Called when one of the text components viewers gets keyboard focus. 
	
	Args:
		comp: the text component
	"""
	#debug('\nonFocus comp:', comp.path)
	return

def onFocusEnd(comp, info):
	"""
	Called when one of the text component's viewers loses keyboard focus. In regular editing mode
	this is right after the contents are saved back to the value parameter. This function is called
	everytime the viewer loses focus, even if the text does not change.
	
	Args:
		comp: the text component
		info: a dictionary containing information about the event including:
			reason: a string indicating what caused the viewer to lose focus e.g. 'enter', 'escape', 'tab', 'unknown'
	
	"""
	#debug('\nonFocusEnd comp:', comp.path, '- info:\n', info)
	return
	
def onTextEdit(comp):
	"""
	Called each time the contents of the text component viewer change i.e. when typing a character,
	deleting text, cutting or pasting. 
	
	Args:
		comp: the text component
	"""
	#debug('\nonTextEdit comp:', comp.path, '- text: ', comp.editText)
	return

	this is right after the contents are saved back to the value parameter. This function is called
	everytime the viewer loses focus, even if the text does not change.
	
	Args:
		comp: the text component
		info: a dictionary containing information about the event including:
			reason: a string indicating what caused the viewer to lose focus e.g. 'enter', 'escape', 'tab', 'unknown'
	
	"""
	#debug('\nonFocusEnd comp:', comp.path, '- info:\n', info)
	return
	
def onTextEdit(comp):
	"""
	Called each time the contents of the text component viewer change i.e. when typing a character,
	deleting text, cutting or pasting. 
	
	Args:
		comp: the text component
	"""
	#debug('\nonTextEdit comp:', comp.path, '- text: ', comp.editText)
	return

def cook(scop):
	ppar = parent().par
	
	parentw = max(1, parent().width)
	parenth = max(1, parent().height)
	
	scop.clear()
	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Slider.Flip :
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'slidertype', 'slideru', '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'clampul', ppar.Clamplow1, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'clampuh', ppar.Clamphigh1, '1'] )
		
		w = parentw
		h = parenth

		sl = labr = ppar.Borderlow/w
		if ppar.Numfield =='edit' :
			sl = sl + (60+ppar.Borderhigh)/w
		sh = 1-ppar.Borderhigh/w
	
		halfhandle = .5*ppar.Handlesize/parentw
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zonel', sl + halfhandle, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zoner', sh - halfhandle, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zoneb', 0, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zonet', 1, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['math', 'fromrange1', ppar.Rangelow1, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['math', 'fromrange2', ppar.Rangehigh1, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['math', 'torange1', (sl + halfhandle) * w, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['math', 'torange2', (sh - halfhandle) * w, '1'] )
		
		#scop.appendRow( ['iovert', 'sy', 1-(4/parenth), '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['interior', 'sx', sh-sl, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['interior', 'tx', sl, '1'] )

		scop.appendRow( ['panelexec', 'panelvalue', "'u click key'", '1'] )
		#scop.appendRow( ['flip', 'npasses', '0', '1'] )
		#scop.appendRow( ['text', 'resolutionw', parentw*osize, '1'] )
		#scop.appendRow( ['text', 'resolutionh', parenth*osize, '1'] )
		
		fieldw = parentw-ppar.Borderlow-ppar.Borderhigh
		if ppar.Numfield =='edit' :
			fieldw = min(60, fieldw)
		scop.appendRow( ['field', 'w', fieldw, '1'] )

	else :
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'slidertype', 'sliderv', '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'clampvl', ppar.Clamplow1, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'clampvh', ppar.Clamphigh1, '1'] )
		
		w = parenth
		h = parentw
		sl = labr = ppar.Borderlow/w
		sh = 1-ppar.Borderhigh/w
	
		halfhandle = .5*ppar.Handlesize/parenth
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zonel', 0, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zoner', 1, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zoneb', sl + halfhandle, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zonet', sh - halfhandle, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['math', 'fromrange1', ppar.Rangelow1, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['math', 'fromrange2', ppar.Rangehigh1, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['math', 'torange1', (sl + halfhandle) * w, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['math', 'torange2', (sh - halfhandle) * w, '1'] )

		#scop.appendRow( ['iovert', 'sy', 1-(4/parentw), '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['interior', 'sy', sh-sl, '1'] )
		scop.appendRow( ['interior', 'ty', sl, '1'] )

		scop.appendRow( ['panelexec', 'panelvalue', "'v click key'", '1'] )
		#scop.appendRow( ['flip', 'npasses', '1', '1'] )
		#scop.appendRow( ['text', 'resolutionw', parenth*osize, '1'] )
		#scop.appendRow( ['text', 'resolutionh', parentw*osize, '1'] )

		scop.appendRow( ['field', 'w', 40, '1'] )
		
	#scop.appendRow( ['..', 'bgcolorr', ppar.Bgcolorr, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['..', 'bgcolorg', ppar.Bgcolorg, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['..', 'bgcolorb', ppar.Bgcolorb, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['..', 'bgalpha', ppar.Bgcolora, '1'] )

	parent().par.bgcolorr = ppar.Bgcolorr.eval()
	parent().par.bgcolorg = ppar.Bgcolorg.eval()
	parent().par.bgcolorb = ppar.Bgcolorb.eval()
	parent().par.bgalpha = ppar.Bgcolora.eval()
	
	fontsize = 12 if ppar.Fontauto==True else ppar.Fontsize
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	#scop.appendRow( ['text', 'dispmethod', ['automatic','bitmap'][osize==1.0], '1'] )	
	#scop.appendRow( ['field/text', 'dispmethod', ['texture','bitmap'][osize==1.0], '1'] )	
	
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )

	if ppar.Labelalign == 'left' :
		pos = 0 if ppar.Labellocate=='left' else (sl-.01)
	elif ppar.Labelalign == 'center' :
		pos = (labr-1-.02)/2 if ppar.Labellocate=='left' else (sl+sh-1)/2
	else :
		pos = (labr-1-.02) if ppar.Labellocate=='left' else (sh-1-.01)
	
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'textoffsetx', pos, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['underoff', 'npasses', int(ppar.Showoffset), '1'] )
	
	scop.appendRow( ['underoff', 'sy', 4/h, '1'] )
		
	return

*�����������������9def setupParameters(scrop):
	return

def cook(scrop):
	ppar = parent().par	
	bgrey = .17	 # background grey
	
	parentw = parent().width
	parenth = parent().height
	
	if (ppar.Horizvert == 'horizontal') or ((ppar.Horizvert == 'auto') and (parentw >= parenth)) :
		w = parentw
	else:
		w = parenth
		
	sl = ppar.Borderlow/w
	if ppar.Numfield =='edit' and op('flip').par.npasses==0 :
		sl = sl + (60+ppar.Borderhigh)/w
	sh = 1-ppar.Borderhigh/w
	
	scrop.clear()

	scrop.appendRow( [0, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] ) 

	scrop.appendRow( [sl, 0, 0, 0, 0] )

	try:
		notchlist = eval(ppar.Notches.val)

		for notch in notchlist :
			nu = sl + notch*(sh-sl)
			scrop.appendRow( [ nu-.01, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )
			scrop.appendRow( [ nu+.01, 0, 0, 0, 0] )
	
	except:
		pass
	scrop.appendRow( [ sh, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )
		
	return

def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	
	parentw = max(1, parent().width)
	parenth = max(1, parent().height)
	la = ppar.Labelalign	
	
	scop.clear()

	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	# scop.appendRow( ['..', 'buttontype', 'momentary', '1'] ) 

	if (ppar.Horizvert == 'horizontal') or ((ppar.Horizvert == 'auto') and (parentw >= parenth)) :
		bw = parentw
		bh = parenth				
	else :
		bw = parenth
		bh = parentw	
		
	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :
		aspectxy = op('topon').width / op('topon').height	
		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth))
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la=='left' or la=='right') else bw )
				
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'resolutionw', lw*osize, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'resolutionh', bh*osize, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	#oltx = iw/bw/2 if ppar.Labellocate=='right' else -iw/bw/2
	#scop.appendRow( ['underlabel', 'tx', oltx, '1'] )
	#oitx = 0
	#if ppar.Labellocate=='left' :
	#	oitx = .5-iw/bw/2
	#elif ppar.Labellocate=='right' :
	#	oitx = -.5+iw/bw/2
	#scop.appendRow( ['undericon', 'tx', oitx, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['overtext', 'tx', oitx, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	return

*�����������������5# callbacks for when associated Panel is being dropped on

def onHoverStartGetAccept(comp, info):
	"""
	Called when comp needs to know if dragItems are acceptable as a drop.

	Args:
		comp: the panel component being hovered over
		info: A dictionary containing all info about hover, including:
			dragItems: a list of objects being dragged over comp
			callbackPanel: the panel Component pointing to this callback DAT

	Returns:
		True if comp can receive dragItems
	"""
	#debug('\nonHoverStartGetAccept comp:', comp.path, '- info:\n', info)
	return True # accept what is being dragged

def onHoverEnd(comp, info):
	"""
	Called when dragItems leave comp's hover area.

	Args:
		comp: the panel component being hovered over
		info: A dictionary containing all info about hover, including:
			dragItems: a list of objects being dragged over comp
			callbackPanel: the panel Component pointing to this callback DAT
	"""
	#debug('\nonHoverEnd comp:', comp.path, '- info:\n', info)

def onDropGetResults(comp, info):
	"""
	Called when comp receives a drop of dragItems. This will only be called if
	onHoverStartGetAccept has returned True for these dragItems.

	Args:
		comp: the panel component being dropped on
		info: A dictionary containing all info about drop, including:
			dragItems: a list of objects being dropped on comp
			callbackPanel: the panel Component pointing to this callback DAT

	Returns:
		A dictionary of results with descriptive keys. Some possibilities:
			'droppedOn': the object receiving the drop
			'createdOPs': list of created ops in order of drag items
			'dropChoice': drop menu choice selected
			'modified': object modified by drop
	"""
	debug('\nonDropGetResults comp:', comp.path, '- info:\n', info)
	return {'droppedOn': comp}

# callbacks for when associated Panel is being dragged

def onDragStartGetItems(comp, info):
	"""
	Called when information about dragged items is required.

	Args:
		comp: the panel clicked on to start drag
		info: A dictionary containing all info about drag
			callbackPanel: the panel Component pointing to this callback DAT

	Returns:
		A list of dragItems: [object1, object2, ...]
	"""
	#dragItems = [comp] # drag the comp itself
	dragItems = [op(op('target')[0,0].val)] # drag the comp itself
	
	debug('\nonDragStartGetItems comp:', comp.path, '- info:\n', info, dragItems)
	return dragItems

def onDragEnd(comp, info):
	"""
	Called when a drag action ends.

	Args:
		comp: the panel clicked on to start drag
		info: A dictionary containing all info about drag, including:
			accepted: True if the drag was accepted, False if not
			dropResults: a dict of drop results. This is the return value of 
				onDropGetResults
			dragItems: the original dragItems for the drag
			callbackPanel: the panel Component pointing to this callback DAT
	"""
	debug('\nonDragEnd comp:', comp.path, '- info:\n', info)

They have removed: icons, label... 
 
binaryC also has help and out1 removed, so you only get its value from the Value1 parameter as always.

Respective unused parameters are disabled.

7def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	ppar = parent().par
	
	w = max(1, parent().width)
	h = max(1, parent().height)
	sl1 = ppar.Borderlow1/w
	sh1 = 1-ppar.Borderhigh1/w
	sl2 = ppar.Borderlow2/h
	sh2 = 1-ppar.Borderhigh2/h	
	
	scop.clear()
	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	scop.appendRow( ['..', 'slidertype', 'slideruv', '1'] )
	
	scop.appendRow( ['..', 'clampul', ppar.Clamplow1, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['..', 'clampuh', ppar.Clamphigh1, '1'] )
	
	halfhandlex = .5*ppar.Handlesize/w		
	scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zonel', sl1 + halfhandlex, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zoner', sh1 - halfhandlex, '1'] )
	
	scop.appendRow( ['rangev1', 'fromrange1', ppar.Rangelow1, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['rangev1', 'fromrange2', ppar.Rangehigh1, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['rangev1', 'torange1', -.5+sl1 + halfhandlex, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['rangev1', 'torange2', -.5+sh1 - halfhandlex, '1'] )
	
	scop.appendRow( ['ramps', 'resolutionw', w, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['ramps', 'resolutionh', h, '1'] )
	
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	
	aligny = 'bottom'
	pos1 = 0
	pos2 = 0

	if ppar.Labellocate=='zone' :
		pos1 = 0 if ppar.Labelalign=='center' else (sh1-1 if ppar.Labelalign=='right' else sl1)
		pos2 = sl2
	elif ppar.Labellocate=='top' :
		aligny = 'top'
	
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'aligny', aligny, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'textoffsetx', pos1, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'textoffsety', pos2, '1'] )
			
	scop.appendRow( ['..', 'clampvl', ppar.Clamplow2, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['..', 'clampvh', ppar.Clamphigh2, '1'] )
	
	halfhandley = .5*ppar.Handlesize/h
	scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zoneb', sl2 + halfhandley, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['..', 'zonet', sh2 + halfhandley, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['rangev2', 'fromrange1', ppar.Rangelow2, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['rangev2', 'fromrange2', ppar.Rangehigh2, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['rangev2', 'torange1', -.5+sl2 + halfhandley, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['rangev2', 'torange2', -.5+sh2 - halfhandley, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	scop.appendRow( ['interior', 'sx', sh1-sl1, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['interior', 'tx', sl1, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['interior', 'sy', sh2-sl2, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['interior', 'ty', sl2, '1'] )
		
	scop.appendRow( ['..', 'bgcolorr', ppar.Bgcolorr, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['..', 'bgcolorg', ppar.Bgcolorg, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['..', 'bgcolorb', ppar.Bgcolorb, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['..', 'bgalpha', ppar.Bgcolora, '1'] )
	
	return

*�����������������=def setupParameters(scrop):
	return

def cook(scrop):
	ppar = parent().par	
	bgrey = .17	 # background grey

	
	w = parent().width
	sl1 = ppar.Borderlow1/w
	sh1 = 1-ppar.Borderhigh1/w	
	
	scrop.clear()
	scrop.appendRow( [0, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] ) 
	scrop.appendRow( [sl1, 0, 0, 0, 0] )
	
	try:
		notchlist = eval(ppar.Notches1.val)

		for notch in notchlist :
			nu = sl1 + notch*(sh1-sl1)
			scrop.appendRow( [ nu-.01, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )
			scrop.appendRow( [ nu+.01, 0, 0, 0, 0] )
	
	except:
		pass
	scrop.appendRow( [ sh1, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )
		
	return

*�����������������ddef setupParameters(scrop):
	return

def cook(scrop):
	ppar = parent().par
	bgrey = .17	 # background grey
	
	h = parent().height
	sl2 = ppar.Borderlow2/h
	sh2 = 1-ppar.Borderhigh2/h	
	
	scrop.clear()
	scrop.appendRow( [0, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] ) 
	scrop.appendRow( [sl2, 0, 0, 0, 0] )
	
	try:
		notchlist = eval(ppar.Notches2.val)

		ns = .01*parent().width/parent().height
		for notch in notchlist :
			nu = sl2 + notch*(sh2-sl2)
			scrop.appendRow( [ nu-ns, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )
			scrop.appendRow( [ nu+ns, 0, 0, 0, 0] )
	
	except:
		pass
	scrop.appendRow( [ sh2, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )
		
	return

*�����������������Mppar = parent().par

def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	
	parentw = max(1, parent().width)
	parenth = max(1, parent().height)
	iconop = op('indicator')
	iconopwidth = iconop.width
	iconopheight = iconop.height

	aspectxy = iconopwidth / parenth
	la = ppar.Labelalign	
	
	scop.clear()

	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	# scop.appendRow( ['..', 'buttontype', 'momentary', '1'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Binary.Flip :
		bw = parentw
		bh = parenth				
	else :
		bw = parenth
		bh = parentw	
		
	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :
		aspectxy = iconopwidth / iconopheight	
		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth)+1)
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la in ['left', 'right', 'center']) else bw )
				
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'w', lw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'h', bh, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	oltx = iw/bw if ppar.Labellocate=='right' else 0
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'x', oltx * bw, '1'] )

	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'w', iw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'h', ih, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )

	oitx = 0
	if ppar.Labellocate=='left' :
		oitx = 1-iw/bw
	elif ppar.Labellocate=='right' :
		oitx = 0
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['indicator', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	return

*�����������������Mppar = parent().par

def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	
	parentw = max(1, parent().width)
	parenth = max(1, parent().height)
	iconop = op('indicator')
	iconopwidth = iconop.width
	iconopheight = iconop.height

	aspectxy = iconopwidth / parenth
	la = ppar.Labelalign	
	
	scop.clear()

	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	# scop.appendRow( ['..', 'buttontype', 'momentary', '1'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Binary.Flip :
		bw = parentw
		bh = parenth				
	else :
		bw = parenth
		bh = parentw	
		
	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :
		aspectxy = iconopwidth / iconopheight	
		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth)+1)
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la in ['left', 'right', 'center']) else bw )
				
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'w', lw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'h', bh, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	oltx = iw/bw if ppar.Labellocate=='right' else 0
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'x', oltx * bw, '1'] )

	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'w', iw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'h', ih, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )

	oitx = 0
	if ppar.Labellocate=='left' :
		oitx = 1-iw/bw
	elif ppar.Labellocate=='right' :
		oitx = 0
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['indicator', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	return

*�����������������Mppar = parent().par

def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	
	parentw = max(1, parent().width)
	parenth = max(1, parent().height)
	iconop = op('indicator')
	iconopwidth = iconop.width
	iconopheight = iconop.height

	aspectxy = iconopwidth / parenth
	la = ppar.Labelalign	
	
	scop.clear()

	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	# scop.appendRow( ['..', 'buttontype', 'momentary', '1'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Binary.Flip :
		bw = parentw
		bh = parenth				
	else :
		bw = parenth
		bh = parentw	
		
	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :
		aspectxy = iconopwidth / iconopheight	
		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth)+1)
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la in ['left', 'right', 'center']) else bw )
				
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'w', lw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'h', bh, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	oltx = iw/bw if ppar.Labellocate=='right' else 0
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'x', oltx * bw, '1'] )

	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'w', iw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'h', ih, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )

	oitx = 0
	if ppar.Labellocate=='left' :
		oitx = 1-iw/bw
	elif ppar.Labellocate=='right' :
		oitx = 0
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['indicator', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	return

*�����������������9def setupParameters(scrop):
	return

def cook(scrop):
	ppar = parent().par	
	bgrey = .17	 # background grey
	
	parentw = parent().width
	parenth = parent().height
	
	if (ppar.Horizvert == 'horizontal') or ((ppar.Horizvert == 'auto') and (parentw >= parenth)) :
		w = parentw
	else:
		w = parenth
		
	sl = ppar.Borderlow/w
	if ppar.Numfield =='edit' and op('flip').par.npasses==0 :
		sl = sl + (60+ppar.Borderhigh)/w
	sh = 1-ppar.Borderhigh/w
	
	scrop.clear()

	scrop.appendRow( [0, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] ) 

	scrop.appendRow( [sl, 0, 0, 0, 0] )

	try:
		notchlist = eval(ppar.Notches.val)

		for notch in notchlist :
			nu = sl + notch*(sh-sl)
			scrop.appendRow( [ nu-.01, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )
			scrop.appendRow( [ nu+.01, 0, 0, 0, 0] )
	
	except:
		pass
	scrop.appendRow( [ sh, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )
		
	return

*�����������������9def setupParameters(scrop):
	return

def cook(scrop):
	ppar = parent().par	
	bgrey = .17	 # background grey
	
	parentw = parent().width
	parenth = parent().height
	
	if (ppar.Horizvert == 'horizontal') or ((ppar.Horizvert == 'auto') and (parentw >= parenth)) :
		w = parentw
	else:
		w = parenth
		
	sl = ppar.Borderlow/w
	if ppar.Numfield =='edit' and op('flip').par.npasses==0 :
		sl = sl + (60+ppar.Borderhigh)/w
	sh = 1-ppar.Borderhigh/w
	
	scrop.clear()

	scrop.appendRow( [0, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] ) 

	scrop.appendRow( [sl, 0, 0, 0, 0] )

	try:
		notchlist = eval(ppar.Notches.val)

		for notch in notchlist :
			nu = sl + notch*(sh-sl)
			scrop.appendRow( [ nu-.01, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )
			scrop.appendRow( [ nu+.01, 0, 0, 0, 0] )
	
	except:
		pass
	scrop.appendRow( [ sh, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )
		
	return

*�����������������Mppar = parent().par

def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	
	parentw = max(1, parent().width)
	parenth = max(1, parent().height)
	iconop = op('indicator')
	iconopwidth = iconop.width
	iconopheight = iconop.height

	aspectxy = iconopwidth / parenth
	la = ppar.Labelalign	
	
	scop.clear()

	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	# scop.appendRow( ['..', 'buttontype', 'momentary', '1'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Binary.Flip :
		bw = parentw
		bh = parenth				
	else :
		bw = parenth
		bh = parentw	
		
	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :
		aspectxy = iconopwidth / iconopheight	
		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth)+1)
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la in ['left', 'right', 'center']) else bw )
				
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'w', lw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'h', bh, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	oltx = iw/bw if ppar.Labellocate=='right' else 0
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'x', oltx * bw, '1'] )

	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'w', iw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'h', ih, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )

	oitx = 0
	if ppar.Labellocate=='left' :
		oitx = 1-iw/bw
	elif ppar.Labellocate=='right' :
		oitx = 0
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['indicator', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	return

	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'w', lw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'h', bh, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	oltx = iw/bw if ppar.Labellocate=='right' else 0
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'x', oltx * bw, '1'] )

	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'w', iw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'h', ih, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )

	oitx = 0
	if ppar.Labellocate=='left' :
		oitx = 1-iw/bw
	elif ppar.Labellocate=='right' :
		oitx = 0
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['indicator', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	return

*�����������������Mppar = parent().par

def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	
	parentw = max(1, parent().width)
	parenth = max(1, parent().height)
	iconop = op('indicator')
	iconopwidth = iconop.width
	iconopheight = iconop.height

	aspectxy = iconopwidth / parenth
	la = ppar.Labelalign	
	
	scop.clear()

	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	# scop.appendRow( ['..', 'buttontype', 'momentary', '1'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Binary.Flip :
		bw = parentw
		bh = parenth				
	else :
		bw = parenth
		bh = parentw	
		
	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :
		aspectxy = iconopwidth / iconopheight	
		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth)+1)
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la in ['left', 'right', 'center']) else bw )
				
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'w', lw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'h', bh, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	oltx = iw/bw if ppar.Labellocate=='right' else 0
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'x', oltx * bw, '1'] )

	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'w', iw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'h', ih, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )

	oitx = 0
	if ppar.Labellocate=='left' :
		oitx = 1-iw/bw
	elif ppar.Labellocate=='right' :
		oitx = 0
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['indicator', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	return

*�����������������Mppar = parent().par

def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	
	parentw = max(1, parent().width)
	parenth = max(1, parent().height)
	iconop = op('indicator')
	iconopwidth = iconop.width
	iconopheight = iconop.height

	aspectxy = iconopwidth / parenth
	la = ppar.Labelalign	
	
	scop.clear()

	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	# scop.appendRow( ['..', 'buttontype', 'momentary', '1'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Binary.Flip :
		bw = parentw
		bh = parenth				
	else :
		bw = parenth
		bh = parentw	
		
	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :
		aspectxy = iconopwidth / iconopheight	
		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth)+1)
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la in ['left', 'right', 'center']) else bw )
				
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'w', lw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'h', bh, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	oltx = iw/bw if ppar.Labellocate=='right' else 0
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'x', oltx * bw, '1'] )

	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'w', iw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'h', ih, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )

	oitx = 0
	if ppar.Labellocate=='left' :
		oitx = 1-iw/bw
	elif ppar.Labellocate=='right' :
		oitx = 0
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['indicator', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	return

It works with a horizontal, vertical or uv horizontal-vertical slider.

Shift-click-and-drag to teach it the gesture. It will repeat when you release the mouse. Optionally you can double-click and drag. Just click the slider to disable the gesture.

Note that the Filter CHOP affects the recording, CHanging the Filter Time in the parent does not change the filtering during playback.

THis component can safely be put in clones.

TUIK2 vertical sliders (slidervert) needs its SLider Type to be set to UV for this to work.

*�����������������9def setupParameters(scrop):
	return

def cook(scrop):
	ppar = parent().par	
	bgrey = .17	 # background grey
	
	parentw = parent().width
	parenth = parent().height
	
	if (ppar.Horizvert == 'horizontal') or ((ppar.Horizvert == 'auto') and (parentw >= parenth)) :
		w = parentw
	else:
		w = parenth
		
	sl = ppar.Borderlow/w
	if ppar.Numfield =='edit' and op('flip').par.npasses==0 :
		sl = sl + (60+ppar.Borderhigh)/w
	sh = 1-ppar.Borderhigh/w
	
	scrop.clear()

	scrop.appendRow( [0, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] ) 

	scrop.appendRow( [sl, 0, 0, 0, 0] )

	try:
		notchlist = eval(ppar.Notches.val)

		for notch in notchlist :
			nu = sl + notch*(sh-sl)
			scrop.appendRow( [ nu-.01, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )
			scrop.appendRow( [ nu+.01, 0, 0, 0, 0] )
	
	except:
		pass
	scrop.appendRow( [ sh, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )
		
	return

*�����������������Mppar = parent().par

def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	
	parentw = max(1, parent().width)
	parenth = max(1, parent().height)
	iconop = op('indicator')
	iconopwidth = iconop.width
	iconopheight = iconop.height

	aspectxy = iconopwidth / parenth
	la = ppar.Labelalign	
	
	scop.clear()

	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	# scop.appendRow( ['..', 'buttontype', 'momentary', '1'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Binary.Flip :
		bw = parentw
		bh = parenth				
	else :
		bw = parenth
		bh = parentw	
		
	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :
		aspectxy = iconopwidth / iconopheight	
		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth)+1)
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la in ['left', 'right', 'center']) else bw )
				
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'w', lw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'h', bh, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	oltx = iw/bw if ppar.Labellocate=='right' else 0
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'x', oltx * bw, '1'] )

	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'w', iw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'h', ih, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )

	oitx = 0
	if ppar.Labellocate=='left' :
		oitx = 1-iw/bw
	elif ppar.Labellocate=='right' :
		oitx = 0
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	#scop.appendRow( ['indicator', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	return

2
*������������������JsliderL is a lightweight version of slider that doesn't have a text field.

2
*����������������� Here are some highly-functional sample sliders.

All the gadgets in one row are actually the same gadget (they were clones of the first gadget in the row (slider and sliderxy)). They only vary via the differences of their custom parameters.

Slider values are kept in custom parameters. The Value parameters are the current values. The CHOP output of the gadgets contain the same values.

'slider' can be set to be horizonal or vertical, or (by default) it can automatically be determined by its width/height aspect ratio. 

Its label can be outside or inside the slider area. It can have a background image in the slider area.

A Notches parameter sets where the in-slider notches are, so you can have a mid-point at 50% in you put [.5] in the parameter (a python list). Or [.25, .5, .75] will add three notches at quarter points.

The output of sliders can be scaled to a low-high range using two parameters, Range Low and Range High.

The handle can be made larger to serve as a scroll bar.

Number Field puts the numeric value in the slider area, or makes the value editable.

The handle can be made larger to serve as a scroll bar. 

Double-click near a notch or the low or high slider level to set to exactly that value. Or Ctrl-click or Alt-click to snap to the notches/top/bottom.

'sliderxy' is similar.

2
*�����������������3def setupParameters(scrop):
	return

def cook(scrop):
	ppar = parent().par
	bgrey = .17	 # background grey
	scrop.clear()
	
	h = ppar.h
	sl2 = ppar.Borderlow2/h
	sh2 = 1-ppar.Borderhigh2/h	
	
	scrop.appendRow( [0, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] ) 
	scrop.appendRow( [sl2, 0, 0, 0, 0] )
	
	try:
		notchlist = eval(ppar.Notches2.val)

		for notch in notchlist :
			nu = sl2 + notch*(sh2-sl2)
			scrop.appendRow( [ nu-.01, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )
			scrop.appendRow( [ nu+.01, 0, 0, 0, 0] )
	
	except:
		pass
	scrop.appendRow( [ sh2, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )
		
	return
